title: gomphrena glabratoides
intro: Gomphrena glabratoides, also known as False Globe Amaranth, is a perennial herb belonging to the Amaranthaceae family. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Gomphrena glabratoides include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Herbal preparations of this plant may include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to leverage its medicinal properties.
